Think about whether you can break the string at certain positions. What if s[0..j] is breakable and s[j+1..i] is a dictionary word?
Use a boolean dp array where dp[i] means s[0..i-1] can be segmented into dictionary words.
For each position i, check all possible j < i. If dp[j] is true and s[j..i-1] is in the dictionary, set dp[i] = true.
Store dictionary words in a Set for O(1) lookup. The answer is dp[s.length].
